text: 🇺🇸 ⚔️ 🇮🇷 Gulf energy output is unlikely to return to pre-war levels for about two years, according to the head of the International Energy Agency. In an interview with Neue Zürcher Zeitung, Fatih Birol said recovery will vary by country—Iraq will take significantly longer than Saudi Arabia—but overall timelines point to a roughly two-year rebound. He also warned that markets are underestimating the impact of a prolonged closure of the Strait of Hormuz. While oil prices have stayed below $100 per barrel this week, that stability may not last. Pre-war shipments are still arriving, but no new tankers were loaded in March, cutting off fresh supply to Asia. That shortfall is now starting to show. If Hormuz remains closed, expect significantly higher energy prices. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚔️ 🇮🇷 据国际能源署署长法提赫·比罗尔称，海湾地区的能源产量在未来两年内不太可能恢复到战前水平。在接受《新苏黎世报》采访时，比罗尔表示，各国恢复的速度会有所不同——伊拉克所需的时间将比沙特阿拉伯长得多——但总体时间表显示大约需要两年时间才能反弹。他还警告称，市场低估了霍尔木兹海峡长期关闭的影响。虽然本周油价保持在每桶100美元以下，但这种稳定性可能不会持续。战前的货物仍在运抵，但3月份没有新的油轮装载，切断了对亚洲的新供应。这种短缺现在开始显现。如果霍尔木兹海峡继续关闭，预计能源价格将大幅上涨。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 A resident from the town of Arnoun in southern Lebanon removes an Israeli flag that was planted by IOF soldiers on Shaqif Castle, along with a surveillance camera used for espionage.
text_zh: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 一名来自黎巴嫩南部阿尔农镇的居民拆除了以色列国防军士兵插在沙基夫城堡上的以色列国旗，以及一个用于间谍活动的监控摄像头。

text: Ukraine's Foreign Minister Andrii Sybiha: We rely on our Turkish friends to organize a meeting at the level of leaders. We are ready for this meeting also in Türkiye — a meeting between Zelensky, Putin, Erdogan, and maybe Trump.
text_zh: 乌克兰外交部长安德烈·西比加：我们依靠我们的土耳其朋友来组织领导人级别的会议。我们也准备在土耳其举行这次会议——泽连斯基、普京、埃尔多安，或许还有特朗普之间的会议。

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 A Lebanese citizen removed the Israeli flag from Beaufort Castle (Qal'at al- Shaqif) in southern Lebanon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 一名黎巴嫩公民拆除了黎巴嫩南部博福特城堡（沙基夫城堡）上的以色列国旗。@wfwitness

text: 🇬🇧 🇫🇷 Starmer arrived in Paris to meet Macron and discuss reopening the Strait of Hormuz. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇬🇧 🇫🇷 斯塔默抵达巴黎，与马克龙会面，讨论重新开放霍尔木兹海峡事宜。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Backchannel talks between the U.S. and Iran are showing progress, with a possible memorandum of understanding at an upcoming meeting and a broader deal within 60 days. “Both sides agree in principle — technical details will follow,” one source said. Source: Reuters
text_zh: 美国和伊朗之间的幕后谈判显示出进展，可能会在即将举行的会议上达成谅解备忘录，并在60天内达成更广泛的协议。一位消息人士称：“双方原则上同意——后续将讨论技术细节。”来源：路透社

text: Israeli Defense Minister Israel Katz: The IDF holds and will continue to hold all the areas it has cleared and captured. The ground maneuver into Lebanon and the strikes against Hezbollah throughout Lebanon have achieved many accomplishments, but they are not yet complete.
text_zh: 以色列国防部长伊斯雷尔·卡茨：以色列国防军已经并将继续控制所有其已清理和占领的地区。进入黎巴嫩的地面机动以及对黎巴嫩各地真主党的打击已经取得了许多成就，但尚未完成。

text: 🇷🇺 ⚔️ 🇺🇦 According to Ukrainian intelligence, Russia is preparing to launch large-scale strikes on Ukraine up to seven times per month — roughly every 4–5 days, Foreign Minister Sybiha said. By their definition, a “massive attack” means at least 400 drones combined with 20 or more missiles. Intelligence suggests this tempo could begin in the near future, he stated at the Antalya Diplomacy Forum. The previous large-scale strike took place yesterday. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 ⚔️ 🇺🇦 据乌克兰情报部门称，俄罗斯正准备每月对乌克兰发动多达七次的大规模袭击——大约每4-5天一次，外交部长西比加表示。按照他们的定义，“大规模袭击”意味着至少400架无人机加上20枚或更多的导弹。他在安塔利亚外交论坛上表示，情报显示这种节奏可能在不久的将来开始。上一次大规模袭击发生在昨天。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: WarMonitor In the middle of the night, the House quietly passed a bill extending FISA through April 30 by unanimous consent at 2:09a.m., after Republicans blocked earlier procedural votes on the disputed warrantless surveillance law. (ABC) tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 在深夜，众议院于凌晨2:09以一致同意的方式悄然通过了一项将FISA延长至4月30日的法案，此前共和党人曾阻止了对这项有争议的无证监视法案进行早期的程序性投票。(ABC) 推文

text: WarTranslated As of now the oil terminal in Tuapse continues to burn, Supernova reports. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045092964452401661/video/1 The General Staff confirms a strike on the Tuapse oil refinery. The fire has been burning for more than 15 hours. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2044879521766158349/video/1 - WarTranslated tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 据Supernova报道，截至目前，图阿普谢的石油码头仍在燃烧。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045092964452401661/video/1 总参谋部证实对图阿普谢炼油厂进行了打击。大火已经燃烧了超过15个小时。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2044879521766158349/video/1 - WarTranslated 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 Ukrainian defenders have eliminated an experienced sniper who went to Ukraine to search for his missing son, along with his entire team. https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2045092082847486072/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 乌克兰守军消灭了一名经验丰富的狙击手，他曾前往乌克兰寻找失踪的儿子，连同他的整个小队一起被消灭。https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2045092082847486072/photo/1 推文

text: WarTranslated Russia is preparing mass attacks on Ukraine seven times a month, Foreign Minister Sybiha says, citing intelligence. He adds a mass attack means at least 400 drones and 20 missiles. tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 外交部长西比哈援引情报称，俄罗斯正准备每月七次对乌克兰发动大规模袭击。他补充说，大规模袭击意味着至少400架无人机和20枚导弹。推文

text: WarTranslated A Russian milblogger hints things are getting worse for Russian occupiers in Chasiv Yar. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045090948464390173/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 一位俄罗斯军事博主暗示，俄罗斯占领者在恰索夫亚尔的情况正在恶化。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045090948464390173/photo/1 推文

text: 🇺🇦 Kiev must urgently find an alternative to thermal power plants, as they are not a reliable source of heat supply — the head of the Ukrainian State Agency for Infrastructure Restoration and Development Sukhomlin "Even if they are restored, and manage to restore some of their capacity by the heating season, a few missiles could again destroy all this work" 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 基辅必须紧急寻找火力发电厂的替代方案，因为它们不是可靠的热力供应来源——乌克兰国家基础设施重建与发展局局长苏霍姆林表示：“即使它们得到修复，并在供暖季节前设法恢复部分产能，几枚导弹可能再次摧毁所有这些工作” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇷🇺 "Rostec" has begun testing "Podorozhnik" filters, which will allow to protect drones and field telephones from electronic warfare systems. The filters installed on sensitive electronics suppress electromagnetic pulses - this allows it to operate stably. The products operate at a temperature of -60 to +125 °C and are designed for 20,000 hours of operation as part of the equipment, which ensures their trouble-free operation throughout the entire 25-year service life 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 “俄罗斯国家技术集团”（Rostec）已开始测试“车前草”（Podorozhnik）滤波器，该滤波器将有助于保护无人机和野战电话免受电子战系统的干扰。安装在敏感电子设备上的滤波器可以抑制电磁脉冲，从而使其能够稳定运行。这些产品的工作温度范围为 -60 至 +125 °C，设计使用寿命为 20,000 小时，可确保其在 25 年的整个使用寿命期间无故障运行 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇦🇷🇺Ukrainian special forces targeted a Rubicon base, an elite drone unit in the Russian Armed Forces, in Mangush, Donetsk region, overnight on April 17th. Rubicon uses almost all strike and reconnaissance drones in use by the Russian Armed Forces, with…" ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 Footage of the Rubicon base in Mangush, Donetsk region, ablaze after being targeted by Ukrainian drones. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇦🇷🇺 4 月 17 日夜间，乌克兰特种部队袭击了位于顿涅茨克地区曼古什（Mangush）的俄罗斯武装部队精锐无人机部队“卢比孔”（Rubicon）基地。卢比孔部队几乎使用了俄罗斯武装部队现役的所有打击和侦察无人机，包括……” ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 乌克兰无人机袭击后，位于顿涅茨克地区曼古什的“卢比孔”基地燃起大火的画面。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 Israeli Defence Minister Israel Katz said the IDF holds and will continue to hold all areas it cleared and captured in Lebanon. He stated that more than 1,700 Hezbollah members have been killed since march. A security zone 10 kilometres deep – from the sea to the Hermon area – has been cleared of Hezbollah, weapons and residents, including the destruction of border villages that became Hezbollah outposts. He stated area between the security zone and the Litani River is not yet cleared and will need to be dealt with diplomatically or militarily after the ceasefire. Strikes beyond the Litani have been paused before achieving their goals. The objective remains disarming Hezbollah by military or political means, with direct U.S. involvement and pressure on the Lebanese government. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 以色列国防部长伊斯雷尔·卡茨（Israel Katz）表示，以色列国防军已经并将继续控制其在黎巴嫩清理和占领的所有区域。他称，自三月以来，已有超过 1,700 名真主党成员被击毙。从海边到黑门山地区，一片 10 公里深的安全区已清除了真主党武装、武器和居民，包括摧毁了已成为真主党前哨站的边境村庄。他表示，安全区与利塔尼河之间的区域尚未清理完毕，需要在停火后通过外交或军事手段处理。在实现目标之前，针对利塔尼河以外地区的打击行动已暂停。目标仍然是通过军事或政治手段解除真主党的武装，并由美国直接介入并向黎巴嫩政府施压。 @wfwitness

text: 🇷🇺 ⚔️ 🇺🇦 Ukrainian infantry taken out by drone operators from the 38th Guards Brigade of the 35th Army, part of the “Vostok” force grouping, in the Zaporozhye region. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 ⚔️ 🇺🇦 扎波罗热地区的乌克兰步兵被隶属于“东方”部队集群的第 35 集团军第 38 近卫旅的无人机操作员消灭。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 Ukrainian special forces targeted a Rubicon base, an elite drone unit in the Russian Armed Forces, in Mangush, Donetsk region, overnight on April 17th. Rubicon uses almost all strike and reconnaissance drones in use by the Russian Armed Forces, with the exception of Geran drones, such as Molniya, Lancet, and Orlan drones. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 4 月 17 日夜间，乌克兰特种部队袭击了位于顿涅茨克地区曼古什的俄罗斯武装部队精锐无人机部队“卢比孔”基地。卢比孔部队几乎使用了俄罗斯武装部队现役的所有打击和侦察无人机（“天竺葵”无人机除外），例如“闪电”（Molniya）、“柳叶刀”（Lancet）和“海鹰”（Orlan）无人机。 @wfwitness

text: Visioner ‼️ 🇷🇺 BREAKING |“Vladimir Putin may decide to attack Europe this spring — the Russian leader reportedly believes his ‘window of opportunity’ is closing, making immediate action necessary. Accordingly, an assault on Europe could take place in the near future,” writes The Washington Post. 📌 The outlet notes that, for Putin, the ideal moment to initiate a war against Europe would be before: European countries complete their rearmament; Ukraine develops new weapons (likely referring to ballistic missiles) capable of striking deeper into Russian territory; Donald Trump, who is described as being hostile toward NATO, remains in the White House. See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet
text_zh: Visioner ‼️ 🇷🇺 突发 |《华盛顿邮报》报道称：“弗拉基米尔·普京可能会决定在今年春天袭击欧洲——据报道，这位俄罗斯领导人认为他的‘机会之窗’正在关闭，因此必须立即采取行动。据此，对欧洲的攻击可能在不久的将来发生。” 📌 该媒体指出，对普京而言，发动对欧战争的理想时机是在以下情况发生之前：欧洲国家完成重新武装；乌克兰研发出能够更深入打击俄罗斯领土的新型武器（可能指弹道导弹）；被描述为对北约持敌对态度的唐纳德·特朗普留在白宫。与我们一起查看最新动态：@visionergeo 推文

text: U.S. Central Command Air Force F-16 Fighting Falcons fuel in flight from a KC-135 Stratotanker high above the U.S. Central Command operating area. https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2045081836515144182/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 美国中央司令部空军的 F-16“战隼”战斗机在美国中央司令部作战区域上空从 KC-135“同温层加油机”进行空中加油。https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2045081836515144182/photo/1 推文

text: 🇱🇧 ⚔️ 🇮🇱 The Lebanese Army announced early Friday morning that Israel has violated the ceasefire agreement that went into effect at midnight, reporting intermittent shelling targeting several villages in southern Lebanon. In an official statement, the Lebanese Army urged citizens to exercise caution and delay their return to southern towns and villages until the field situation becomes clearer. According to the Lebanese National News Agency, Israeli artillery fire persisted despite the truce, specifically targeting the towns of Khiam and Debbine. These strikes were reportedly accompanied by intensive machine-gun fire in both areas. Witnesses also noted heavy activity by Israeli reconnaissance aircraft over Rashaya, the western slopes of Mount Hermon, and the Western Beqaa region, signaling continued military operations despite the cessation of hostilities. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇱🇧 ⚔️ 🇮🇱 黎巴嫩军队周五凌晨宣布，以色列违反了于午夜生效的停火协议，报告称有间歇性炮击针对黎巴嫩南部的几个村庄。在一份官方声明中，黎巴嫩军队敦促公民保持谨慎，并推迟返回南部城镇和村庄，直到实地局势变得更加明朗。据黎巴嫩国家通讯社报道，尽管达成了休战，但以色列的炮火仍在持续，特别针对希亚姆（Khiam）和德宾（Debbine）镇。据报道，这些袭击伴随着这两个地区密集的机枪扫射。目击者还注意到以色列侦察机在拉沙亚（Rashaya）、黑门山（Mount Hermon）西坡和西贝卡（Western Beqaa）地区上空活动频繁，这表明尽管敌对行动已经停止，但军事行动仍在继续。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 There is no legal basis for imposing tolls for passage through the Strait of Hormuz , International Maritime Organization (IMO) Secretary General Arsenio Dominguez stated. “The right to freedom of navigation in straits is not up for debate and is not a subject of negotiation for the IMO,” he pointed out in an interview with El Pais. “There are no legal grounds for imposing tolls in the strait. Iran has every right to submit a proposal and justify its necessity, but it must be submitted jointly with Oman, as this is precisely what international law requires,” the UN official emphasized. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 国际海事组织（IMO）秘书长阿尔塞尼奥·多明格斯（Arsenio Dominguez）表示，对通过霍尔木兹海峡征收通行费没有法律依据。“海峡航行自由权不容辩论，也不是国际海事组织的谈判议题，”他在接受《国家报》（El Pais）采访时指出。“对海峡征收通行费没有任何法律依据。伊朗完全有权提交提案并证明其必要性，但必须与阿曼共同提交，因为这正是国际法所要求的，”这位联合国官员强调。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Syrian President Ahmad al-Sharaa: The Golan is Syrian land. It is not for any state to give away or recognize. More than 134 countries recognize that the Golan is Syrian.
text_zh: 叙利亚总统艾哈迈德·沙拉（Ahmad al-Sharaa）：戈兰高地是叙利亚领土。任何国家都无权将其赠予或承认。超过134个国家承认戈兰高地属于叙利亚。

text: Lebanon's 10 Day Ceasefire Begins But Israel Can Strike at Will A newly announced Israel-Lebanon ceasefire has halted fighting as displaced Lebanese begin returning home, but the terms effectively allow Israel to continue striking inside Lebanon at will, raising questions over whether the truce signals real de-escalation. READ MORE
text_zh: 黎巴嫩为期10天的停火协议生效，但以色列仍可随意发动袭击。新宣布的以黎停火协议已停止了战斗，流离失所的黎巴嫩人开始返回家园，但协议条款实际上允许以色列继续在黎巴嫩境内随意发动袭击，这引发了人们对此次休战是否标志着真正局势缓和的质疑。阅读更多

text: 🇺🇦 Ukraine will try to attract more Africans to compensate for the shortage of workers, Budanov said. The Security Service of Ukraine and the Ministry of Foreign Affairs have been instructed to review the list of "migration risk" countries, which determines the rules for the entry and legalization of foreigners. "About two or three weeks ago, I held a large meeting on our relations with Africa. The protocol decision was to instruct the Ministry of Foreign Affairs and the Security Service of Ukraine to urgently work on changes to the list of migration risk countries," Budanov stated. Budanov noted that the strict approach is partly related to the risks of illegal migration, as some foreigners, after obtaining documents, leave their employers, or use Ukraine as a transit country for further relocation. Budanov didn't specify, which countries could be included in the Ukrainian "migration list" 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 布达诺夫表示，乌克兰将尝试吸引更多非洲人以弥补劳动力短缺。乌克兰安全局和外交部已接到指示，重新审查“移民风险”国家名单，该名单决定了外国人入境和合法化的规则。“大约两三周前，我就我们与非洲的关系举行了一次大型会议。会议的协议决定是指示外交部和乌克兰安全局紧急研究修改移民风险国家名单，”布达诺夫表示。布达诺夫指出，这种严格的方法部分与非法移民风险有关，因为一些外国人在获得证件后会离开雇主，或将乌克兰作为进一步迁移的中转国。布达诺夫没有具体说明哪些国家可能被列入乌克兰的“移民名单” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Syrian President Ahmad al-Sharaa: We were not a party in any conflict against Iran during the war taking place currently with Iran. We were pushing in a direction not to spark this war from the start, because Iran is a state that has a population of about 85 million people, and any harm that hits Iran from the inside could affect the region in general. We are pushing for the region to be stable and for its problems to be solved via dialogue and diplomacy, not to enter into conflicts and big disputes. We hope this war stops and the region moves to a phase where such wars will not repeat.
text_zh: 叙利亚总统艾哈迈德·沙拉（Ahmad al-Sharaa）：在当前与伊朗发生的战争中，我们不是针对伊朗的任何冲突的一方。我们从一开始就推动不引发这场战争的方向，因为伊朗是一个拥有约8500万人口的国家，任何从内部打击伊朗的伤害都可能影响整个地区。我们正在推动地区稳定，并通过对话和外交解决问题，而不是卷入冲突和重大争端。我们希望这场战争停止，地区进入一个不再重演此类战争的阶段。

text: 🇺🇦 The thermal power station was shut down in Chernigov after the night-time strikes, according to the city council. The supply of hot water to consumers of "Teplokommunenergo" has been temporarily suspended. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 据市议会称，切尔尼戈夫的火力发电站在夜间袭击后关闭。向“Teplokommunenergo”用户供应的热水已暂时中断。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇸🇾 🇮🇱 U.S. Special Envoy to Syria Barrack says that Syria has never fired at Israel under the Al Sharaa government. "Syria under the Al Sharra regime has never fired a shot at Israel. Quite the opposite. President Al Sharra has said time and time again, there are no issues with Israel. We don't want an adversarial issue with Israel. We don't want to be at war with Israel. We want to work towards a non aggression agreement and a normalization agreement." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇸🇾 🇮🇱 美国叙利亚问题特使巴拉克表示，在沙拉政府领导下，叙利亚从未向以色列开火。“在沙拉政权下的叙利亚从未向以色列开过一枪。恰恰相反。沙拉总统多次表示，与以色列没有问题。我们不想与以色列发生对抗。我们不想与以色列开战。我们希望努力达成互不侵犯协议和关系正常化协议。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Iran’s army commander, Major General Amir Hatami, said on Army Day that the armed forces are ready to confront any enemy threat with firm resolve, an iron will and hands on the trigger. He stated that the army has prevented outsiders from violating the country’s dignity, security and independence, and stands powerfully against sworn enemies while also providing relief and humanitarian services. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 伊朗陆军司令阿米尔·哈塔米少将在建军节上表示，武装部队已做好准备，以坚定的决心、钢铁般的意志和随时扣动扳机的手来应对任何敌人的威胁。他指出，军队阻止了外部势力侵犯国家的尊严、安全和独立，在有力对抗宿敌的同时，也提供了救援和人道主义服务。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah MP Ali Fayyad said residents have returned to their villages as a response to Israel, rejecting Israeli conditions. He warned that the U.S. ceasefire memorandum is dangerous because it grants Israel the inherent right to self‑defence while denying Lebanon that right, and allows Israel to strike what it deems a potential threat. Lebanese Parliament Speaker Nabih Berri warned that every bullet fired in the air endangers innocent lives and property. “National unity and civil peace are a red line I will not allow to be crossed under any circumstances,” he said, adding: “I am Shia in identity, Sunni in inclination, Arab in destination.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党议员阿里·法耶德表示，居民们已返回村庄以回应以色列，并拒绝了以色列的条件。他警告称，美国的停火备忘录是危险的，因为它赋予以色列固有的自卫权，却剥夺了黎巴嫩的这一权利，并允许以色列打击其认为的潜在威胁。黎巴嫩议会议长纳比·贝里警告说，每一颗向空中发射的子弹都会危及无辜的生命和财产。“民族团结与国内和平是我在任何情况下都不会允许被逾越的红线，”他说，并补充道：“我的身份是什叶派，倾向是逊尼派，目的地是阿拉伯。” @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel Hezbollah claims in a post-ceasefire statement that it carried out 2,184 attacks over 45 days, averaging 49 per day, reaching up to 160 km into Israeli territory. "Our hands remain on the trigger… our fighters will continue until their last breath. Victory belongs only to Allah." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：真主党在停火后的声明中声称，在45天内发动了2184次袭击，平均每天49次，打击范围深入以色列境内达160公里。“我们的手依然扣在扳机上……我们的战士将战斗到最后一口气。胜利只属于真主。” 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇷🇺 Sergei Shoigu said Russia may invoke Article 51 of the UN Charter “for self-defense” against Finland and the Baltic states, claiming Ukrainian drones use their airspace to strike Russian territory. 📌 “Recently, there has been an increase in cases where Ukrainian UAVs move toward Russia via Finland and the Baltic states. If these countries deliberately allow their airspace to be used, Russia will consider it an armed attack. Under international law, this would trigger Article 51 of the UN Charter, which grants the right to self-defense.” 📌 “If these countries knowingly turn their skies into a corridor for Ukrainian drones, Russia will exercise its right to self-defense guaranteed by the UN Charter,” Shoigu added. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转推 @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇷🇺 谢尔盖·绍伊古表示，俄罗斯可能会援引《联合国宪章》第51条，针对芬兰和波罗的海国家进行“自卫”，并声称乌克兰无人机利用这些国家的领空打击俄罗斯领土。📌 “最近，乌克兰无人机经由芬兰和波罗的海国家飞往俄罗斯的案例有所增加。如果这些国家蓄意允许其领空被利用，俄罗斯将视其为武装攻击。根据国际法，这将触发《联合国宪章》第51条，该条款赋予了自卫权。” 📌 “如果这些国家明知故犯，将天空变成乌克兰无人机的走廊，俄罗斯将行使《联合国宪章》保障的自卫权，”绍伊古补充道。与我们一起查看最新动态： @NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Open Source Intel Commander of Irans Ground Forces Brigadier General Ali Jahanshahi: “The Army of the Islamic Republic of Iran is the most popular army in the world” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045072615371342170/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：伊朗地面部队司令阿里·贾汉沙希准将：“伊朗伊斯兰共和国军队是世界上最受欢迎的军队” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045072615371342170/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel A Russian oil refinery in Tuapse has been burning for a second straight day. Smoke has stretched nearly 200 km. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045072538091262406/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：俄罗斯图阿普谢的一家炼油厂已连续第二天起火。烟雾蔓延了近200公里。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045072538091262406/video/1 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇹🇷 🇵🇰 🇪🇬 🇸🇦 🇮🇷 Reuters: The foreign ministers of Turkey, Pakistan, Egypt and Saudi Arabia will meet today on the sidelines of a diplomatic forum in Antalya to discuss solutions to regional issues, including the war in Iran. The four countries also met twice last month as part of mediation efforts to end the conflict. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇹🇷 🇵🇰 🇪🇬 🇸🇦 🇮🇷 路透社：土耳其、巴基斯坦、埃及和沙特阿拉伯的外交部长今天将在安塔利亚外交论坛期间会面，讨论包括伊朗战争在内的地区问题解决方案。这四个国家上个月也曾两次会面，作为结束冲突调解努力的一部分。 @wfwitness

text: Syrian President Ahmad al-Sharaa: Syria has saved the region from the expansion of some regional countries. They were using Syria as a platform for launching attacks or destabilizing the region. The weapon was loose in Syria, and we started the process of controlling this weapon in a very large way.
text_zh: 叙利亚总统艾哈迈德·沙拉：叙利亚拯救了该地区，使其免受某些地区国家扩张的影响。他们曾利用叙利亚作为发动袭击或破坏地区稳定的平台。叙利亚境内的武器曾处于失控状态，我们已经开始以非常大的力度控制这些武器。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 Al-Akhbar : Despite the U.S. naval blockade, Iranian commercial and oil tankers continue to enter and exit Iranian ports with only limited restrictions. Tehran fears that extending the ceasefire without tangible results may give Washington time to build up its military forces and raise its demands. Iran’s military remains on high alert for comprehensive defence. A senior diplomatic source told Al‑Akhbar that Iran did not open the Strait of Hormuz to the promised 15‑17 ships per day because Israel violated the Lebanon ceasefire, which was part of the Iran‑US truce. Iran made clear that a new round of negotiations with the U.S. is conditional on Lebanon being back on the table. Iran informed its Lebanese allies of the truce before Trump’s call with Lebanese President Aoun. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 《消息报》：尽管美国实施了海军封锁，但伊朗的商船和油轮仍以有限的限制进出伊朗港口。德黑兰担心，在没有取得实质性成果的情况下延长停火，可能会给华盛顿时间来集结军事力量并提高要求。伊朗军队仍处于全面防御的高度戒备状态。一位高级外交消息人士告诉《消息报》，伊朗没有开放霍尔木兹海峡以实现每天15-17艘船只的承诺，是因为以色列违反了作为伊美休战一部分的黎巴嫩停火协议。伊朗明确表示，与美国进行新一轮谈判的前提是黎巴嫩问题必须重新摆上桌面。伊朗在特朗普与黎巴嫩总统奥恩通话前，已将其休战情况告知了黎巴嫩盟友。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇱 Israeli media report: - An explosive device detonated among Israeli forces in southern Lebanon, causing serious injuries. - 6 soldiers and officers, killed and wounded. - The device was attached to a building; it collapsed after troops entered.
text_zh: 🇮🇱 以色列媒体报道：- 一枚爆炸装置在黎巴嫩南部的以色列军队中引爆，造成严重伤亡。- 6名士兵和军官死亡或受伤。- 该装置被安装在一栋建筑物上；部队进入后建筑物倒塌。

text: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 🇪🇺 Reuters: The European Union plans to deepen its engagement with Syria by relaunching formal political contacts and paving the way for closer economic and security ties. The EU will fully resume its 1978 cooperation agreement with Syria and begin a High-Level Political Dialogue with the country’s transitional authorities on May 11. The EU also said it would “reframe and adapt” its sanctions regime to maintain leverage while engaging with Syria’s leadership and targeting spoilers of the transition. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 🇪🇺 路透社：欧盟计划通过重启正式政治接触并为更紧密的经济和安全关系铺平道路，来深化与叙利亚的接触。欧盟将全面恢复其1978年与叙利亚的合作协议，并于5月11日开始与该国过渡当局进行高级别政治对话。欧盟还表示，将“重构和调整”其制裁制度，以便在与叙利亚领导层接触并针对过渡进程破坏者的同时，保持影响力。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to Clash Report: "Syrian President Ahmad al-Sharaa struggles to open a water bottle during an interview in London, the female host politely helps him open it." WATCH: In Antalya, Türkiye, Syrian President Ahmad al-Sharaa opens a water bottle and jokes: This is better than Britain.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 Clash Report：“叙利亚总统艾哈迈德·沙拉在伦敦接受采访时难以打开一瓶水，女主持人礼貌地帮他打开了。” 观看：在土耳其安塔利亚，叙利亚总统艾哈迈德·沙拉打开一瓶水并开玩笑说：这比在英国好。

text: Ukraine's Foreign Minister Andrii Sybiha: We have a good example, Türkiye. Now, as far as I remember they cover up to 80% of the needs of their army. That's a true miracle, how Türkiye scaled up defense industry. It means we should become more self-sufficient to reduce dependence on critical materials, on critical elements of weaponry, to scale up national defense industries. Now Ukraine could cover 40% of the needs for our army.
text_zh: 乌克兰外交部长安德烈·西比哈：我们有一个很好的例子，那就是土耳其。据我所知，他们现在能满足其军队高达80%的需求。土耳其如何扩大国防工业规模是一个真正的奇迹。这意味着我们应该变得更加自给自足，以减少对关键材料、关键武器元件的依赖，并扩大国家国防工业规模。现在乌克兰可以满足我们军队40%的需求。

text: Syrian President Ahmad al-Sharaa: Syria has not received direct aid until this moment. However, there were promises of aid, and many investment contracts were also made, including memoranda of understanding and contracts that have started on the ground and entered the field of work. So, I believe that this policy is what Syria is moving towards at this time. But nevertheless, Syria needs some assistance to move faster and more steadily. But we try to rely on ourselves in the first place, and if aid comes, it should not be politicized or conditioned.
text_zh: 叙利亚总统艾哈迈德·沙拉：叙利亚目前尚未收到直接援助。不过，此前曾有援助承诺，也签订了许多投资合同，包括谅解备忘录和已经开始实施并进入工作领域的合同。因此，我认为这就是叙利亚目前正在推行的政策。尽管如此，叙利亚仍需要一些援助来更快、更稳健地前进。但我们首先尝试依靠自己，如果援助到来，它不应被政治化或附加条件。

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Latest statements from surviving sailors of the IRIS Dena after returning to Iran: - When leaving the ship, the second torpedo hit the sailors' evacuation area. - We were on the water for 10 hours until rescue ships arrived. - The bodies of 20 martyrs are still missing.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 伊朗IRIS德纳号幸存船员返回伊朗后的最新声明：- 弃船时，第二枚鱼雷击中了船员撤离区。- 我们在水上漂浮了10个小时，直到救援船抵达。- 20名烈士的遗体仍然下落不明。

text: Syrian President Ahmad al-Sharaa: First, there's the constitutional declaration to fill the political and power vacuum in the Syrian state. After that, holding elections to form a parliament, followed by drafting a constitution. Then comes building an economic infrastructure, creating a suitable environment for the economic and investment climate, and restoring international and regional relations. We also moved towards lifting sanctions and then investing after those sanctions were lifted. I believe that over five years, Syria will also require numerous rounds of census-taking and data collection, including demographic data. As you know, Syria has faced significant external and internal displacement. All of this needs to be documented again. Furthermore, there's the task of restoring the country's unity, as it was somewhat torn and divided. Many things we expected to take five years—some were achieved within a single year—thanks to God and the resilience of the Syrian people, along with the support of those who care for Syria.
text_zh: 叙利亚总统艾哈迈德·沙拉：首先是发布宪法声明，以填补叙利亚国家的政治和权力真空。此后，举行选举以组建议会，随后起草宪法。接下来是建立经济基础设施，为经济和投资环境创造适宜的条件，并恢复国际和地区关系。我们还致力于解除制裁，并在制裁解除后进行投资。我相信，在五年内，叙利亚还需要进行多轮人口普查和数据收集，包括人口统计数据。如你所知，叙利亚面临着严重的外部和内部流离失所问题。所有这些都需要重新记录。此外，还有恢复国家统一的任务，因为国家在某种程度上被撕裂和分裂了。我们原本预计需要五年才能完成的许多事情——有些在一年内就实现了——这要感谢上帝和叙利亚人民的韧性，以及那些关心叙利亚的人们的支持。

text: INTERESTING: A U.S. Navy MQ-4C Triton surveillance drone flew a 12+ hour mission near Cuba, monitoring areas around Havana and Guantánamo Bay from international airspace.
text_zh: 有趣：一架美国海军MQ-4C“海神”监视无人机在古巴附近执行了超过12小时的任务，从国际领空监视哈瓦那和关塔那摩湾周边地区。

text: Hungary's Viktor Orbán after his election defeat: I feel younger after the defeat. This pain has released a lot of energy.
text_zh: 匈牙利的维克托·欧尔班在选举失败后表示：失败后我感觉更年轻了。这种痛苦释放了巨大的能量。

text: Hungary's Viktor Orbán after his election defeat: I felt pain… and emptiness. I am healing myself with work. I went through emotional rollercoaster.
text_zh: 匈牙利的维克托·欧尔班在选举失败后表示：我感到痛苦……和空虚。我正在用工作来治愈自己。我经历了一场情绪过山车。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Reuters: The U.S. Navy has experienced disruptions to its unmanned vessel tests due to outages and connectivity issues with SpaceX's Starlink satellite network. The incidents have raised concerns about the military's reliance on the technology, with some lawmakers warning about the risks of depending on a single company for crucial national security capabilities. SpaceX has become a key player in the U.S. military's technology landscape, providing satellite communications and space launches, and is expected to go public with a $2 trillion valuation this summer. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 路透社：由于SpaceX星链卫星网络的中断和连接问题，美国海军的无人舰艇测试受到了干扰。这些事件引发了人们对军方依赖该技术的担忧，一些议员警告称，依赖单一公司提供关键的国家安全能力存在风险。SpaceX已成为美国军事技术领域的重要参与者，提供卫星通信和太空发射服务，预计将于今年夏天以2万亿美元的估值上市。@wfwitness

text: Syrian President Ahmad al-Sharaa: I believe at the end of this month, the first session of the elected Syrian parliament will be held. Also, among the agenda of the Syrian parliament will be the drafting of the constitution. Within the constitution, many legislations will be enacted, and they will also be voted on.
text_zh: 叙利亚总统艾哈迈德·沙拉：我相信在本月底，新当选的叙利亚议会将举行第一次会议。此外，叙利亚议会的议程中还将包括起草宪法。在宪法框架内，将制定许多法律，并将对其进行投票表决。
